title: YTP Tennis: Eddy Prefers Sanjaya to Boobies
description:
Round 2 of YTP Tennis vs. MahsuginaChicken.

I realise that I am at a bit of a disadvantage, since I use WMM, which doesn't have as many effects as Adobe and Vegas.  But what I lack in effects I make up for in quality, and as you can see, I've got plenty of that.

There's also the fact that I'm facing a veteran in MahsuginaChicken, but if he shows any sign of hesitation, I WILL drop the dodongo on him! Enjoy! :)
